title: "Erika wanted his position": Candace Owens reacts after Charlie Kirk reportedly named wife Erika as TPUSA successor before assassination
summary_full: Candace Owens has questioned claims that Charlie Kirk chose wife Erika Kirk as his successor at Turning Point USA before his assassination. Owens cast doubt on the authenticity of an audio recording allegedly captured during a private Aspen donor retreat and demanded the release of full video footage. TPUSA has refused, citing donor privacy concerns, further fueling online debate and controversy.
